content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 20, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 20, 2026, focused on cloud infrastructure hardening, mobile performance profiling, and pipeline optimization. Key achievements include the implementation of the Mobile Resource Workbench for on-device telemetry, significant latency reductions for dedicated cloud agents via DB-locality fixes, and the introduction of dynamic provider filtering hooks to improve agent state management.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Latency Optimization**
*   Implemented local in-container PGlite databases for managed agents to resolve shared Postgres connection pooling issues ([#8754](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8754)).
*   Reduced dedicated-chat latency from ~30s to 6–11s by porting DB-locality fixes to `main` and excluding `plugin-local-inference` from lean-chat cloud agents ([#8783](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8783), [#8771](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8771), [#8762](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8762)).
*   Deferred billing/settlement chains off the response hot path to prevent blocking model responses ([#8759](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8759)).

**Mobile Resource Workbench & Performance**
*   Launched end-to-end on-device resource profiling for iOS and Android, tracking battery, RSS, token throughput, and thermal states ([#8814](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8814)).
*   Pruned desktop runtime dependencies to prevent nested dependency path issues in bundles ([#8774](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8774)).

**Core Pipeline & UI Enhancements**
*   Added `compose_state_providers` pipeline hook to allow app-level control over dynamic provider filtering ([#8778](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8778)).
*   Improved UI responsiveness by adding package-local preview images for app/view cards and fixing hero registry caching ([#8806](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8806)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Cloud & UI:** [#8820](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8820) (CLI inference), [#8819](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8819) (cloud handoff UI), [#8818](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8818) (vault/keychain fix), [#8817](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8817) (scenario runner seed).
*   **Plugin & Core:** [#8784](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8784), [#8782](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8782) (SSE streaming), [#8781](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8781), [#8780](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8780), [#8777](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8777), [#8776](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8776), [#8775](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8775), [#8773](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8773), [#8772](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8772), [#8770](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8770), [#8767](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8767), [#8766](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8766), [#8765](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8765), [#8764](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8764), [#8763](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8763), [#8761](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8761), [#8760](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8760), [#8758](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8758), [#8757](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8757), [#8804](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8804), [#8803](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8803).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Pipeline & State Management**
*   [#8755](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8755): Resolved the request for dynamic provider filtering by implementing the `compose_state_providers` hook.

**Mobile & Performance Benchmarking**
*   [#8800](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8800): Completed the Mobile Resource Workbench for comprehensive on-device performance profiling.
*   [#8789](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8789): Addressed the need for a long-form transcription mode.

## NEW ISSUES

**Voice & Command System Overhaul**
*   [#8786](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8786), [#8785](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8785), [#8787](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8787), [#8788](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8788), [#8790](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8790), [#8791](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8791), [#8792](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8792): Proposed a comprehensive sweep to unify voice pipelines, slash commands, and proactive agent comments.

**Quality Assurance & Infrastructure**
*   [#8756](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8756): Tracking operator steps for launch-hardening.
*   [#8793](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8793), [#8794](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8794), [#8795](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8795), [#8796](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8796), [#8797](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8797), [#8798](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8798), [#8801](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8801), [#8802](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8802): Issues focused on E2E test coverage, production-quality audits, and benchmarking.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   [#8756](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8756): Ongoing coordination regarding agent image bumps and staging environment verification. Operators are finalizing host-side steps to complete the launch-hardening lane.
*   [#8810](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8810): Discussion on unifying the cloud-sandbox agent handoff state machine. Developers are evaluating the removal of redundant client-side pairing logic in favor of server-side session management.
